hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; [[ "$f" == *.ts ]] && bunx @biomejs/biome check --write "$f" || true; } 2>/dev/null || true

cd /Users/jackmcpherson/Projects/tipper && bunx @biomejs/biome check . 2>&1 && bun run typecheck 2>&1 || { echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Biome check or typecheck failed. Fix errors before committing."}'; exit 0; }
